title: VOLCRAFT
description: The official modpack for the UTK Minecraft server.
body:
## Welcome to the VOLCRAFT Client The recommended default modpack for VOLCRAFT SMP! The goal of this modpack is to be non-obtrusive to traditional play whilst also significantly improving the Minecraft experience. VolCraft Modpack has three primary focuses:
**Improved Performance** - Mods like Sodium and Entity Culling provide a significant bump to FPS, making your gameplay much smoother.
**Better Visuals** - While playing, you'll notice some water splashing, chunks fading in, and better skin layers on other players. These are just a few of the visual enhancements added by this modpack. Also.. theres shader support!
**Quality of Life** - Light follows you when you hold a torch, you can freecam to look at a build you just finished, and shulkerboxes have detailed tooltips! In another sense, these features and more like it will also make your gameplay much smoother. This modpack is entirely client side, which means you can play on any world or server that supports the same Minecraft version. While you could just play Vanilla Minecraft, this modpack does not stray far from the charm of the base game and also provides a bunch of features any type of player can enjoy. These mods were all carefully selected to make your experience the best it can be. This modpack will match pace with the SMP server as it updates. If you'd like to play on our SMP, feel free to join our discord! [https://discord.gg/xXrrewBVEN](https://discord.gg/xXrrewBVEN)
